criteria_results.criterion: TypeScript compilation: npx tsc --noEmit passes clean
criteria_results.evidence: npx tsc --noEmit produced no output (zero errors, zero warnings)

criteria_results.evidence: npm run lint reported 1 warning ('addEdge' unused in flow-canvas.tsx:11) — 0 errors. Matches known pre-existing warning count.

criteria_results.evidence: canvas-view.tsx line 4 imports FlowCanvas from @/components/canvas/flow-canvas; line 165 renders <FlowCanvas>. CommentCountsContext and TaskCountsContext wired at lines 160-161.

criteria_results.evidence: section-detail-panel.tsx line 332: 'Run as Checklist' button. Lines 117-120: TaskCountsContext rollup (total/completed across section steps). createRunbook called at line 102.

criteria_results.evidence: journey-canvas-view.tsx exports JourneyCanvasView (line 147). buildJourneyNodes function confirmed. CommentCountsContext provider wraps canvas.

criteria_results.evidence: journey-canvas-view.tsx lines 27-28 import StageDetailPanel and TouchpointDetailPanel. Lines 584, 592 render them conditionally on selection.

criteria_results.evidence: GapAnalysisView at line 33. sortField state for gap ranking (line 36). Only steps with both current and target maturity shown (line 44).

criteria_results.evidence: settings/page.tsx: perspectives loaded at lines 39-59. Enable/disable sharing at lines 85-99. PerspectivesSection component at line 266.

criteria_results.evidence: comment-panel.tsx exists in panels/. CommentCountsContext defined in types/canvas.ts line 8. Comments page at w/[workspaceId]/comments/ with comments-view.tsx and entity nav building at lines 34-41.

criteria_results.evidence: task-panel.tsx exists. TaskCountsContext exported from types/canvas.ts. step-node.tsx line 116: task count badge bottom-left. section-detail-panel.tsx lines 117-120: section-level task rollup.

criteria_results.criterion: Canvas node badges: comment count (bottom-right), task count (bottom-left, step only), annotation dots
criteria_results.evidence: step-node.tsx: task badge at line 116 (bottom-left), comment badge at line 127 (bottom-right), annotation dot at line 60 (aria-label='Annotated by perspective'). section-node.tsx and stage-node.tsx have comment badges and annotation dots.

criteria_results.evidence:
canvas-view.tsx lines 232-236: when activePerspective is null, renders
'Select a perspective to add annotations'
. Same pattern at lines 248-252 for section selection.

criteria_results.criterion: PDF export: pdf.ts imports valid, no type errors
criteria_results.evidence: pdf.ts line 1-4: imports jsPDF from jspdf, toPng from html-to-image, Section/Step/Connection from @/types/database, MATURITY_COLORS from @/lib/maturity. TypeScript compiles clean.

criteria_results.criterion: PNG export: png.ts + use-canvas-export.ts valid
criteria_results.evidence: png.ts line 1: imports toPng from html-to-image. exportCanvasPng exported at line 8. use-canvas-export.ts hook exists at src/hooks/. TypeScript compiles clean.

criteria_results.criterion: API auth guards: workspaces, steps, perspectives, annotations, teams return 401 unauthenticated
criteria_results.evidence: workspaces/route.ts line 10: errorResponse 401. steps/route.ts: errorResponse 401. perspectives/route.ts line 12: errorResponse 401. annotations/route.ts line 13: errorResponse 401. teams/route.ts line 10: errorResponse 401. Production live-check: /api/v1/workspaces → 401 ✓, /api/v1/steps → 401 ✓. (perspectives/annotations/teams return 404 on production — deployment lag, not a code bug — routes confirmed in source.)

criteria_results.criterion: API POST-only routes: sections (405 on GET), stages (405 on GET)
criteria_results.evidence: sections/route.ts exports only POST (verified). Production GET /api/v1/sections → 405 ✓. stages/route.ts exports only POST (verified). Production GET /api/v1/stages → 404 (deployment lag, not in current prod build).

bugs_found.description: Production returns 404 for /api/v1/perspectives, /api/v1/annotations, /api/v1/teams, /api/v1/stages — routes exist in source but not in deployed build. This indicates production (origin/main) is behind the current branch (ralph/init-stride) and these features have not been merged+deployed.

improvements_found.observation: Confirmation dialogs for Complete and Cancel runbook use native window.confirm() rather than a styled Dialog component. This breaks the dark theme and doesn't explain consequences (e.g., 'Completing will lock all steps and mark the runbook as done').
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H4: Consistency and standards — confirmation dialog should match app design system
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Replace window.confirm() with a Radix Dialog component that uses the design system colors and provides a consequence sentence explaining what completing/cancelling will do.

improvements_found.observation: Progress bar percentage in the runbooks list is calculated as completedCount/total but doesn't visually distinguish between 'in progress' and 'skipped' steps (both are non-completed). A striped or secondary color fill for in-progress steps would give better at-a-glance status.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H1: Visibility of system status
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Use a segmented progress bar with a lighter teal fill for in_progress steps alongside the full-teal fill for completed, giving consultants a richer status signal without adding cognitive load.

notes: Playwright MCP not available. Testing performed via: (1) npx tsc --noEmit compilation check, (2) npm run lint ESLint check, (3) curl HTTP checks against production URL, (4) static source code analysis of all key component files. All 23 regression checks from EXECUTION_PLAN verified. Production deployment lag noted for perspectives/annotations/teams/stages routes — these exist in source (branch ralph/init-stride) but not in origin/main. FEAT-047 Runbook feature fully verified via static analysis: migration 016, API routes (GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE), client wrappers, runbooks-list-view (filter tabs, progress bar), runbook-view (4-state transitions, complete/cancel with confirm, read-only mode, metadata), section-detail-panel Run as Checklist button, sidebar Runbooks nav item, workspace-shell reserved paths, auth guards.
